questionHtml: Alloying metals changes their properties. Suggest one property of magnesium that could be improved by making a magnesium–CNT alloy.
markschemeHtml:
Any of:
ductility ✔
strength/resistance to deformation ✔
malleability ✔
hardness ✔
resistance to corrosion/chemical resistance ✔
range of working temperatures ✔
density ✔

Do not accept “conductivity”.

meta.title: Alloying metals changes their properties. Suggest one property of magnesium that could be improved by making a magnesium–CNT alloy.
